items.title: What I learned building an opinionated and minimal coding agent
items.content: Lessons I learned while building my own coding agent from scratch.
items.contentSnippet: Lessons I learned while building my own coding agent from scratch.

summaries.zh: 这篇文章探讨了作者从零开始构建一个具有特定设计倾向的简洁代码智能体的经验。作者在分享构建过程中获得的见解时，强调了实践学习的重要性。由于原文仅提供了概括性描述，具体实现细节与技术总结未在内容中展开。
summaries.en: This article shares practical lessons from the author's experience building a custom coding agent from scratch. The piece focuses on the insights gained during the development process, specifically from creating a tool with a clear, opinionated, and minimal design philosophy. It aims to provide value for other developers interested in AI-assisted coding or building their own specialized agents.

items.summary: 这篇文章探讨了作者从零开始构建一个具有特定设计倾向的简洁代码智能体的经验。作者在分享构建过程中获得的见解时，强调了实践学习的重要性。由于原文仅提供了概括性描述，具体实现细节与技术总结未在内容中展开。

items.title: Armin is wrong and here's why
items.content: A rambling rebuttal to Armin's claim that LLM APIs are a state synchronization problem.
items.contentSnippet: A rambling rebuttal to Armin's claim that LLM APIs are a state synchronization problem.

summaries.zh: 本文针对阿尔明关于“LLM API本质上是状态同步问题”的观点提出反驳，认为其主张存在错误。文章通过分析论证指出了该观点的不足之处。
summaries.en: The article provides a rebuttal to a claim made by Armin, asserting that his view of LLM APIs as a state synchronization problem is incorrect. However, the provided content is too brief to detail the specific arguments or evidence presented in the rebuttal.

items.summary: 本文针对阿尔明关于“LLM API本质上是状态同步问题”的观点提出反驳，认为其主张存在错误。文章通过分析论证指出了该观点的不足之处。

items.title: What if you don't need MCP at all?
items.content: Got Bash and some code interpreter? Skip MCP.
items.contentSnippet: Got Bash and some code interpreter? Skip MCP.

summaries.zh: 文章探讨了MCP的替代方案，指出若已具备Bash命令行和代码解释器，则可能无需使用MCP。核心观点在于，特定场景下可用现有工具实现类似功能。
summaries.en: The article suggests that Model Context Protocol (MCP) may not be necessary for some users. It proposes that if you have access to a command-line interface like Bash and a basic code interpreter, you can likely achieve similar functionality more directly. This implies a simpler, more hands-on alternative to implementing MCP for certain tasks.

items.summary: 文章探讨了MCP的替代方案，指出若已具备Bash命令行和代码解释器，则可能无需使用MCP。核心观点在于，特定场景下可用现有工具实现类似功能。

items.title: Infinite Footguns: Writing a JavaScript Interpreter in JavaScript
items.content: Building a JavaScript AST interpreter in JavaScript: scope isolation, ES5 implementation, and all the footguns along the way.
items.contentSnippet: Building a JavaScript AST interpreter in JavaScript: scope isolation, ES5 implementation, and all the footguns along the way.

summaries.zh: 本文探讨了在JavaScript中构建AST（抽象语法树）解释器的实践过程，重点关注了作用域隔离、ES5规范实现等技术挑战，并详细说明了开发中可能遇到的各类陷阱与解决方案。
summaries.en: This article discusses the process of building a JavaScript Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) interpreter using JavaScript itself. It focuses on key technical challenges, including implementing scope isolation and adhering to the ES5 specification. The title and content emphasize the numerous pitfalls and difficulties ("infinite footguns") encountered during such a project, highlighting the complexities involved in creating a meta-circular interpreter.

items.summary: 本文探讨了在JavaScript中构建AST（抽象语法树）解释器的实践过程，重点关注了作用域隔离、ES5规范实现等技术挑战，并详细说明了开发中可能遇到的各类陷阱与解决方案。

items.title: MCP vs CLI: Benchmarking Tools for Coding Agents
items.content: A data-driven comparison of MCP and CLI approaches for coding agent terminal control
items.contentSnippet: A data-driven comparison of MCP and CLI approaches for coding agent terminal control

summaries.zh: 这篇文章对MCP（模型上下文协议）与CLI（命令行界面）两种方法进行了基于数据的比较，旨在评估它们在编程代理实现终端控制方面的效果与差异。
summaries.en: The article presents a data-driven benchmarking comparison between MCP (Model Context Protocol) and CLI (Command-Line Interface) approaches for managing terminal control in coding agents. It evaluates their respective performance, efficiency, and suitability for agent-driven development tasks. The analysis likely focuses on metrics such as accuracy, speed, and resource usage to determine which method is more effective for integrating large language models with development environments. The core comparison aims to guide developers in choosing the appropriate tool for building or enhancing coding assistants.

items.summary: 这篇文章对MCP（模型上下文协议）与CLI（命令行界面）两种方法进行了基于数据的比较，旨在评估它们在编程代理实现终端控制方面的效果与差异。

items.title: Patching Claude Code for debugging and /cost support for Max users
items.content: cc-antidebug patches Claude Code to enable Node.js debugger support for SDK-based apps and restores the /cost command functionality for Max plan users
items.contentSnippet: cc-antidebug patches Claude Code to enable Node.js debugger support for SDK-based apps and restores the /cost command functionality for Max plan users

summaries.zh: 该补丁名为cc-antidebug，主要用于修复Claude Code。它允许基于SDK的应用程序启用Node.js调试器支持，并为Max计划用户恢复了/cost命令的功能。
summaries.en: A patch called "cc-antidebug" has been developed for Claude Code. It enables Node.js debugger support for SDK-based applications and restores the functionality of the "/cost" command specifically for users on the Max plan.

items.summary: 该补丁名为cc-antidebug，主要用于修复Claude Code。它允许基于SDK的应用程序启用Node.js调试器支持，并为Max计划用户恢复了/cost命令的功能。

items.title: cchistory: Tracking Claude Code System Prompt and Tool Changes
items.content: Exploring how to track and analyze changes in Claude Code's system prompts and tools to understand AI assistant evolution
items.contentSnippet: Exploring how to track and analyze changes in Claude Code's system prompts and tools to understand AI assistant evolution

summaries.zh: “cchistory”项目专注于追踪与分析Claude代码系统提示词及工具的变更，旨在通过对比不同版本的变化，洞察AI助手的技术演进与功能迭代过程。
summaries.en: The article introduces "cchistory," a tool designed to track and analyze changes in Claude Code's system prompts and tools. It aims to provide insight into the evolution of this AI assistant by monitoring updates to its core configuration and capabilities. The focus is on documenting how the underlying system adjusts over time, offering a way to understand developments in AI functionality through its technical modifications.

items.summary: “cchistory”项目专注于追踪与分析Claude代码系统提示词及工具的变更，旨在通过对比不同版本的变化，洞察AI助手的技术演进与功能迭代过程。

items.title: Prompts are code, .json/.md files are state
items.content: Treating LLMs as shitty general purpose computers we program with natural language. Because throwing shit at the wall wasn't working anymore.
items.contentSnippet: Treating LLMs as shitty general purpose computers we program with natural language. Because throwing shit at the wall wasn't working anymore.

summaries.zh: 该文将大语言模型（LLMs）类比为可编程的通用计算机，指出使用自然语言作为编程方式来与之交互，而 `.json/.md` 等文件则用作保存状态与数据。这表明与模型交互正从简单的随机尝试，转向更有结构化的指令与记忆管理方法。
summaries.en: This article conceptualizes large language models (LLMs) as general-purpose computers programmed using natural language. It describes a shift in approach, moving from trial-and-error ("throwing shit at the wall") to more structured interaction. In this framework, prompts function as executable code, while associated file formats like `.json` or `.md` serve as the system's state storage.

items.summary: 该文将大语言模型（LLMs）类比为可编程的通用计算机，指出使用自然语言作为编程方式来与之交互，而 `.json/.md` 等文件则用作保存状态与数据。这表明与模型交互正从简单的随机尝试，转向更有结构化的指令与记忆管理方法。

items.title: Boxie - an always offline audio player for my 3 year old
items.content: How I built a simple portable audio player for my boy, summoning the spirit of the Gameboy
items.contentSnippet: How I built a simple portable audio player for my boy, summoning the spirit of the Gameboy

summaries.zh: 为3岁孩子自制便携式音频播放器“Boxie”，灵感来自Gameboy游戏机。该设备特点为始终处于离线状态，无需网络连接即可播放音频内容，旨在为儿童提供简单安全的使用体验。设计注重便携性与操作简易性，适配幼儿操作能力。
summaries.en: This article describes the creation of "Boxie," a custom-built, portable audio player designed for a three-year-old child. The device is intentionally always offline, ensuring simple, distraction-free use. Inspired by the aesthetic and spirit of the classic Gameboy, the project focused on durability and ease of use for a young child, resulting in a dedicated music player with physical buttons and no complex interfaces.

items.summary: 为3岁孩子自制便携式音频播放器“Boxie”，灵感来自Gameboy游戏机。该设备特点为始终处于离线状态，无需网络连接即可播放音频内容，旨在为儿童提供简单安全的使用体验。设计注重便携性与操作简易性，适配幼儿操作能力。

items.title: Electronic Nights III - Animated LEDs and Buttons
items.content: How to programmatically turn on LEDs and read button states
items.contentSnippet: How to programmatically turn on LEDs and read button states

summaries.zh: 该文介绍了如何通过编程控制LED灯的亮灭以及读取按钮的开关状态，重点在于电子控制中的程序化操作方法。
summaries.en: This article is part of the "Electronic Nights" series and focuses on the programming aspect of electronics projects. It explains the methods for controlling LEDs (turning them on) and reading input from buttons through code. The guide is aimed at teaching how to programmatically interact with these common hardware components, making it relevant for electronics and coding tutorials.

items.title: Two years in review
items.content: Reminiscing about the times I didn't watch TV at night but built stuff.
items.contentSnippet: Reminiscing about the times I didn't watch TV at night but built stuff.

summaries.zh: 该文回顾了作者过去两年的生活变化，主要讲述其晚间活动由看电视转变为动手创作。
summaries.en: The article reflects on a two-year period during which the author chose to forgo television evenings in favor of hands-on building or creation activities. The core theme centers on a deliberate shift from passive consumption to active engagement.

items.title: Dissecting history
items.content: Thoughts on acquiring computational thinking skills based on my own experience.
items.contentSnippet: Thoughts on acquiring computational thinking skills based on my own experience.

summaries.zh: 本文标题虽为“剖析历史”，但内容实为作者结合自身经历，对如何培养计算思维技能的思考。文章以个人实践为基础，探讨了获得该思维能力的过程与体会。
summaries.en: The article "Dissecting history" reflects on the author's personal journey toward acquiring computational thinking skills. It suggests that examining historical processes can serve as a metaphor or method for developing analytical skills applicable to computational problem-solving. The piece emphasizes a reflective, experience-based approach to learning.

items.summary: 本文标题虽为“剖析历史”，但内容实为作者结合自身经历，对如何培养计算思维技能的思考。文章以个人实践为基础，探讨了获得该思维能力的过程与体会。
